name: Widget
comment:
This module contains functions for displaying data.

@docs select, multiSelect, collapsable, carousel, dialog, tab

values.name: carousel
values.comment:
A Carousel circles through a non empty list of contents.

```
    Widget.carousel
        {content = ("Blue",["Yellow", "Green" , "Red" ]|> Array.fromList)
        ,current = model.carousel
        , label = \c ->
            [ Input.button [Element.centerY]
                { onPress = Just <|
                     SetCarousel <|
                        (\x -> if x < 0 then 0 else x) <|
                            model.carousel - 1
                , label = "<" |> Element.text
                }
            , c |> Element.text
            , Input.button [Element.centerY]
                { onPress = Just <|
                    SetCarousel <|
                        (\x -> if x > 3 then 3 else x) <|
                        model.carousel + 1
                , label = ">" |> Element.text
                }
            ]
            |> Element.row [Element.centerX, Element.width<| Element.shrink]
        }
```
values.type: { content : ( a, Array.Array a ), current : Basics.Int, label : a -> Element.Element msg } -> Element.Element msg

values.name: collapsable
values.comment:
Some collapsable content.

```
    Widget.collapsable
        {onToggle = ToggleCollapsable
        ,isCollapsed = model.isCollapsed
        ,label = Element.row Grid.compact
            [ Element.html <|
                if model.isCollapsed then
                    Heroicons.cheveronRight  [ Attributes.width 20]
                else
                    Heroicons.cheveronDown [ Attributes.width 20]
            , Element.el Heading.h4 <|Element.text <| "Title"
            ]
        ,content = Element.text <| "Hello World"
        }
```
values.type: { onToggle : Basics.Bool -> msg, isCollapsed : Basics.Bool, label : Element.Element msg, content : Element.Element msg } -> Element.Element msg

values.name: dialog
values.comment:
A dialog element displaying important information.

```
    Framework.Layout
        [ Element.inFront <|
            if model.displayDialog then
                Widget.dialog
                    { onDismiss = Just <| ToggleDialog False
                    , content =
                        [ "This is a dialog window"
                            |> Element.text
                        , Input.button []
                            {onPress = Just <| ToggleDialog False
                            , label = Element.text "Ok"
                            }
                        ]
                        |> Element.column []
                    }
            else Element.none
        ] <|
            Element.text "some Content"
```
values.type: { onDismiss : Maybe.Maybe msg, content : Element.Element msg } -> Element.Element msg

values.name: multiSelect
values.comment: Selects multible options. This can be used for checkboxes.
values.type: { selected : Set.Set comparable, options : List.List comparable, label : comparable -> Element.Element msg, onChange : comparable -> msg, attributes : Basics.Bool -> List.List (Element.Attribute msg) } -> List.List (Element.Element msg)

values.name: select
values.comment: Selects one out of multiple options. This can be used for radio buttons or Menus.
values.type: { selected : Maybe.Maybe a, options : List.List a, label : a -> Element.Element msg, onChange : a -> msg, attributes : Basics.Bool -> List.List (Element.Attribute msg) } -> List.List (Element.Element msg)

values.name: tab
values.comment: Displayes a list of contents in a tab
values.type: List.List (Element.Attribute msg) -> { selected : a, options : List.List a, onChange : a -> msg, label : a -> Element.Element msg, content : a -> Element.Element msg, attributes : Basics.Bool -> List.List (Element.Attribute msg) } -> Element.Element msg

name: Widget.Snackbar

aliases.type: { queue : Queue.Queue ( a, Basics.Int ), current : Maybe.Maybe ( a, Basics.Int ) }

values.name: current
values.comment: Returns the current element.
values.type: Widget.Snackbar.Model a -> Maybe.Maybe a

values.name: dismiss
values.comment: Dismiss the current message.
values.type: Widget.Snackbar.Model a -> Widget.Snackbar.Model a

values.name: init
values.comment: Inital state
values.type: Widget.Snackbar.Model a

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert a message that will last for 10 seconds.
values.type: a -> Widget.Snackbar.Model a -> Widget.Snackbar.Model a

values.name: insertFor
values.comment: Insert a message for a specific amount of milli seconds.

values.name: timePassed
values.comment:
Updates the model. This functions should be called regularly.
The first argument is the milli seconds that passed since the last time the function was called.
values.type: Basics.Int -> Widget.Snackbar.Model a -> Widget.Snackbar.Model a

name: Widget.SortTable
comment:
A Sortable list allows you to sort coulmn.

```
    SortTable.view
        { content =
            [ {id = 1, name = "Antonio", rating = 2.456}
            , {id = 2, name = "Ana", rating = 1.34}
            , {id = 3, name = "Alfred", rating = 4.22}
            , {id = 4, name = "Thomas", rating = 3 }
            ]
        , columns =
            [ SortTable.intColumn
                { title = "Id"
                , value = .id
                , toString = \int -> "#" ++ String.fromInt int
                }
            , SortTable.stringColumn
                { title = "Name"
                , value = .name
                , toString = identity
                }
            , SortTable.floatColumn
                { title = "rating"
                , value = .rating
                , toString = String.fromFloat
                }
            ]
        , model = model
        }
        |> (\{data,columns} ->
            {data = data
            ,columns = columns
                |> List.map (\config->
                        { header =
                            Input.button [Font.bold]
                                { onPress =
                                    { title = config.header
                                    , asc =
                                        if config.header == model.title then
                                            not model.asc
                                        else
                                            True
                                    }
                                        |> SortBy
                                        |> Just
                                , label =
                                    if config.header == model.title then
                                        [ config.header |> Element.text
                                        , Element.text <|
                                            if model.asc then
                                                "/\"
                                            else
                                                "\/"
                                        ]
                                            |> Element.row [Font.bold]
                                    else
                                        config.header  |> Element.text
                                }
                        , view = config.view >> Element.text
                        , width = Element.fill
                        }
                    )
            })
        |> Element.table []
```

@docs Model, init, view, sortBy

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment: The Model contains the sorting column name and if ascending or descending.

values.name: floatColumn

values.type: { title : String.String, value : a -> Basics.Float, toString : Basics.Float -> String.String } -> Widget.SortTable.Column a

values.name: init
values.comment: The initial State setting the sorting column name to the empty string.
values.type: Widget.SortTable.Model

values.name: intColumn
values.comment: A Column containing a Int
values.type: { title : String.String, value : a -> Basics.Int, toString : Basics.Int -> String.String } -> Widget.SortTable.Column a

values.name: sortBy
values.comment:
Change the sorting criteras.

```
    sortBy =
        identity
```
values.type: { title : String.String, asc : Basics.Bool } -> Widget.SortTable.Model

values.name: stringColumn
values.comment: A Column containing a String
values.type: { title : String.String, value : a -> String.String, toString : String.String -> String.String } -> Widget.SortTable.Column a

values.name: view
values.comment: The View
values.type: { content : List.List a, columns : List.List (Widget.SortTable.Column a), model : Widget.SortTable.Model } -> { data : List.List a, columns : List.List { header : String.String, view : a -> String.String } }

name: Widget.ValidatedInput

values.name: getError
values.comment: returns the error (if one exists)
values.type: Widget.ValidatedInput.Model err a -> Maybe.Maybe err

values.name: getRaw
values.comment: returns the raw value (the value that the user currently sees)
values.type: Widget.ValidatedInput.Model err a -> String.String

values.name: getValue
values.comment: returns the value (the value that has been last successfully validated)
values.type: Widget.ValidatedInput.Model err a -> a

values.name: init
values.comment:
The initial state contains

  - `value`: starting value
  - `validator`: a vaidation function (a decoder)
  - `toString`: a function that returns a string representation
values.type: { value : a, validator : String.String -> Result.Result err a, toString : a -> String.String } -> Widget.ValidatedInput.Model err a

values.name: update
values.type: Widget.ValidatedInput.Msg -> Widget.ValidatedInput.Model err a -> Widget.ValidatedInput.Model err a

values.name: view
values.comment:
the view function, the parameters include

  - `msgMapper`: A function wrapping the `Msg` into a `msg`
  - `placeholder`: See Element.text for more information
  - `label`: The (hidden) label of the input (needed for screen readers)
  - `readOnly`: a representation of the validated value
    (clicking on the element will turn on edit mode)
values.type: List.List (Element.Attribute msg) -> Widget.ValidatedInput.Model err a -> { msgMapper : Widget.ValidatedInput.Msg -> msg, placeholder : Maybe.Maybe (Element.Input.Placeholder msg), label : String.String, readOnly : a -> Element.Element msg } -> Element.Element msg
